prospects_table.body: Use the columns in this import as columns in your prospects table

import.processing: We will send you an email when the import is complete.

webservice.step_1:
To associate your zap with this import,
Connect to Zapier, and create your zap there:
Create a Zap
webservice.step_2:
Choose Google Sheet as Trigger,
Choose New Spreadsheet Row [instant] as Event,
Click on Continue.
webservice.step_3:
Choose your Google account containing the Google Sheet file to import into Choose account,
Click on Continue.
webservice.step_4:
Choose the Google Sheet file in Spreedsheet,
Choose the sheet in Worksheet,
Click on Continue.
webservice.step_5:
Click on Test Trigger to verify that Zapier has access to your Google Sheet file,
Click on Continue.
webservice.step_6:
Choose Webhooks by Zapier as Action,
Choose GET as Event,
Click on Continue.
webservice.step_8:
You can use the following parameters as
Query String Params to associate with the columns in the Google Sheet file:

body.0: Define the action that your campaign will perform.
body.1: You can drag and drop and associate multiple actions with a campaign.

body.0: Drag and drop a new campaign into the area.
Combine rules for your campaign.
Set rules to filter leads that will be affected by your campaign.
Transform a filter category into a classic field.
body.1: All filters associated with a prospect belonging to this category will be converted into information in a classic field of the same name.

dashboard_project.name: List of projects
dashboard_project.body: Manage your leads in various projects

dashboard_project_new.name: New projects
dashboard_project_new.body: Create multiple projects where you can manage your leads

project_document_template_tab_file.name: Document - Files
project_document_template_tab_file.body: Add PDF files to the template which will be used as backgrounds for pages generated in prospect documents.

project_document_template_tab_font.name: Document - Fonts
project_document_template_tab_font.body: You can integrate other text fonts to format the texts in the fields you add in the documents.

project_document_template_tab_page.name: Document - Pages
project_document_template_tab_page.body: Add new pages (blank or from a PDF) to your template.

body.0: Place and format lead fields in your template.
body.1: These fields will be replaced by the prospects' real information when generating their document.

project_document_template_tab_project.name: Document - Template - Project
project_document_template_tab_project.body: Place y and also format project fields which will be replaced by your project info.

project_document_template_tab_map.name: Document - Template - MAP
project_document_template_tab_map.body: The MAP fields allow you to add a MAP image which will represent the location of the prospect attached to the generated document.

project_document_template_tab_date.name: Document - Template - Dates
project_document_template_tab_date.body: Add date fields that will be replaced with today's date the document will be generated.

body.0: Find fields linked to the quote here (quote table, etc.).
You can also add:
body.1: or filter categories in the document, the filters linked to the prospect of the document belonging to the category will be listed in place of the field when generating the document.
body.2: or filters which will be replaced by an icon check if the filter is linked to the prospect.

body.0: Field - Transform into filter
body.1: Transform a field into a filter category.

body.0:
Access the prospects table to manage information and filters relating to prospects.
Or to manage SMS, messages, calls, quotes, etc.
Manage your calendars and appointments with your prospects.
Locate your prospects in your map.
See the list of quotes
View various statistics in your project.

Edit a PDF document template.
The templates can be re-used to generate PDF documents for prospects.
Perform automatic actions on your prospects based on the filters you apply on your prospects:
Search for prospects, users, filters, ...
body.1: You can also search for features such as: "Import leads", "Email sending settings", ...

body.0: Refine your searches with the various filters here.
You can use a filter category to color markers in the MAP.
Locate your users' vehicle locations here.
Export the prospects selected in your table to an XLSX file.
In case some of your prospects are not in the MAP, this tool will allow you to search for their addresses again.

You can hold CTRL
and <>tap-drag
body.1: and press-drag with the mouse to draw a search circle in the MAP.
body.3: and click on several locations to draw a search polygon.

total-prospects-per-label.title: Prospects by filter
total-prospects-per-label.description: Choose multiple filters or selection of filters or menu and see the current distribution of prospects in these filters in your project.

total-prospects-per-country.title: Prospects by country
total-prospects-per-country.description: Show the total quantity of your leads based on the countries they are located in

new-prospects-per-label-per-day.title: New prospects
new-prospects-per-label-per-day.description: Track the number of new prospects matching a selection of filters from this date

total-prospects-per-label-per-day.title: Total prospects
total-prospects-per-label-per-day.description: Follow the evolution of the total number of prospects matching a selection of filters from this date

new-orders-price-per-day.title: Total new quotes per day
new-orders-price-per-day.description: Show the total amount of your new quotes per day

total-orders-price-per-day.title: Total quote per day
total-orders-price-per-day.description: Show the total quantity of your quote sums per day

new-commissions-per-user-per-day.title: Total new commissions per user per day

total-commissions-per-user-per-day.title: Total commissions per user per day
total-commissions-per-user-per-day.description: Show the total amount of your commission amounts per user per day
